name: ProjectHephaestus
description: Shared tooling and commands for the HomericIntelligence agentic ecosystem

plugins.name: hephaestus
plugins.description: Shared tooling plugin for the HomericIntelligence ecosystem. Provides /skill-advisor (task routing), /advise (search skills registry), /learn (capture session learnings), /myrmidon-swarm (hierarchical agent orchestration), /brainstorm (design before code), /test-driven-development (RED-GREEN-REFACTOR), /systematic-debugging (root cause first), /verification (evidence before claims), /git-worktrees (isolated workspaces), /finish-branch (branch completion), /code-review (Sonnet reviewer + feedback), and /repo-analyze variants (repository auditing).
